ch01.title: Boot Sequence
ch01.description: Learn the basics: print(), variables, and data types. Every hack starts with a single print statement.

ch02.title: Operative Profile
ch02.description: Master strings, f-strings, and user input. Build your digital identity.

ch03.title: Access Control
ch03.description: Crack conditional logic: if, elif, else. The building's security runs on decisions.

ch04.title: Patrol Routes
ch04.description: Loop through the guards' patterns with for and while loops.

ch05.title: Operative Functions
ch05.description: Define reusable hacking tools with functions.

ch06.title: Asset Inventory
ch06.description: Organize data with lists, tuples, dictionaries, and sets.

ch07.title: Intel Files
ch07.description: Read and write data files. Information is power.

ch08.title: Mission Dossiers
ch08.description: Handle errors gracefully with try/except. A good operative always has a backup plan.

ch09.title: Field Manual
ch09.description: Advanced tools: modules, lambda, map/filter, regex.

ch11.title: Quality Assurance
ch11.description: Testing, type hints, and dataclasses. Professional-grade code.

ch12.title: Deep Cover
ch12.description: Advanced Python: generators, decorators, context managers, async, pattern matching.
